queries.question: Which terminal IDs are the same at all airports?
queries.sql: SELECT Terminals.airport_id  from Airports_Terminals join Terminals on Airports_Terminals.terminal_id = Terminals.id join Airports on Terminals.airport_id = Airports.id   GROUP BY Airports_Terminals.terminal_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Airports_Terminals.airport_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Airports)

queries.question: For each airport, provide the corresponding type of terminals.
queries.sql: select airports.name , terminals.type from Airports_Terminals join Terminals on Airports_Terminals.terminal_id = Terminals.id join Airports on Terminals.airport_id = Airports.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?airports_terminals a :Airports_Terminals .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?airports_terminals p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?terminals p:hasAirports ?airports .
  ?airports p:name ?name .
  ?terminals p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Which type of terminals is shared across all airports?
queries.sql: SELECT Terminals.type  from Airports_Terminals join Terminals on Airports_Terminals.terminal_id = Terminals.id join Airports on Terminals.airport_id = Airports.id   GROUP BY Airports_Terminals.terminal_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Airports_Terminals.airport_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Airports)

queries.question: For each airport, list IDs of terminals used.
queries.sql: select airports.name , terminals.airport_id from Airports_Terminals join Terminals on Airports_Terminals.terminal_id = Terminals.id join Airports on Terminals.airport_id = Airports.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?airport_id WHERE {
  ?airports_terminals a :Airports_Terminals .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?airports_terminals p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?terminals p:hasAirports ?airports .
  ?airports p:name ?name .
  ?terminals p:hasAirports ?airport_id_ref .
  ?airport_id_ref p:id ?airport_id .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me IDs of terminals every airport has.
Which types of terminals are associated with each airport?
